title: struthiopteris struthiopteris
intro: Struthiopteris struthiopteris, also known as the water polypody fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris struthiopteris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
